scripts.install:all: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c red,blue "npm run install:server" "npm run install:client"
scripts.build:all: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c red,blue "npm run build:server" "npm run build:client"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c red,blue "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
scripts.start: npm run install:all && npm run build:all && npm run start:all
